If.name: If
If.description: Executes one of two execution outputs based on the value of the input condition. If the condition is true, the top execution output will be used, and if the condition is false, the bottom execution output will be used.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution input to trigger the condition check

static.name: Condition
static.description: The condition to evaluate

static.name: Then
static.description: The execution output if the condition is true

static.name: Else
static.description: The execution output if the condition is false

And.name: And
And.description: Executes the output if all input conditions are true. If any condition is false, the output will not be executed.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be evaluated

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value if all conditions are true

Or.name: Or
Or.description: Executes the output if any input condition is true. If all conditions are false, the output will not be executed.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be evaluated

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value if any condition is true

Not.name: Not
Not.description: Inverts the input condition. If the input is true, the output will be false, and vice versa.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to be inverted

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value is the inverse of the input

Xor.name: Xor
Xor.description: Executes the output if exactly one input condition is true. If none or more than one condition is true, the output will not be executed.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be evaluated

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value if exactly one condition is true

Nand.name: Nand
Nand.description: Executes the output if not all input conditions are true. If all conditions are true, the output will not be executed.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be evaluated

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value if not all conditions are true

Add.name: Add
Add.description: Executes the output by adding all input values. The result is the sum of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be added

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the sum of all input values

Subtract.name: Subtract
Subtract.description: Executes the output by subtracting all input values. The result is the difference of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be subtracted

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the difference of all input values

Multiply.name: Multiply
Multiply.description: Executes the output by multiplying all input values. The result is the product of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be multiplied

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the product of all input values

Divide.name: Divide
Divide.description: Executes the output by dividing all input values. The result is the quotient of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be divided

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the quotient of all input values

Modulo.name: Modulo
Modulo.description: Executes the output by calculating the remainder of the division of all input values. The result is the remainder of the division of all input values.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input value to be divided

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the remainder of the division of all input values

Clamp.name: Clamp
Clamp.description: Executes the output by clamping the input value between a minimum and maximum value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The value to be clamped

static.name: Min
static.description: The minimum value to clamp to

static.name: Max
static.description: The maximum value to clamp to

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the clamped value between the minimum and maximum

Abs.name: Abs
Abs.description: Executes the output by calculating the absolute value of the input. The result is the absolute value of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the absolute value for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the absolute value of the input

Sin.name: Sin
Sin.description: Executes the output by calculating the sine of the input. The result is the sine of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the sine for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the sine of the input

Cos.name: Cos
Cos.description: Executes the output by calculating the cosine of the input. The result is the cosine of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the cosine for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the cosine of the input

Tan.name: Tan
Tan.description: Executes the output by calculating the tangent of the input. The result is the tangent of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the tangent for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the tangent of the input

Asin.name: Asin
Asin.description: Executes the output by calculating the arcsine of the input. The result is the arcsine of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the arcsine for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the arcsine of the input

Acos.name: Acos
Acos.description: Executes the output by calculating the arccosine of the input. The result is the arccosine of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the arccosine for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the arccosine of the input

Atan.name: Atan
Atan.description: Executes the output by calculating the arctangent of the input. The result is the arctangent of the input.

static.name: Input
static.description: The input value to calculate the arctangent for

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the arctangent of the input

Atan2.name: Atan2
Atan2.description: Executes the output by calculating the arctangent of two inputs. The result is the angle for the provided Y and X values.

static.name: Y
static.description: The Y value used to calculate the arctangent.

static.name: X
static.description: The X value used to calculate the arctangent.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the arctangent of the provided Y and X values.

Equals.name: Equals
Equals.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values for equality. The result is true if the inputs are equal, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for equality

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the inputs are equal, false otherwise

Not Equals.name: Not Equals
Not Equals.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values for inequality. The result is true if the inputs are not equal, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for inequality

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the inputs are not equal, false otherwise

Greater Than.name: Greater Than
Greater Than.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values. The result is true if the first input is greater than the second input, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for the 'greater than' condition

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the first input is greater than the second input, false otherwise

Less Than.name: Less Than
Less Than.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values. The result is true if the first input is less than the second input, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for the 'less than' condition

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the first input is less than the second input, false otherwise

Greater Than Or Equal.name: Greater Than Or Equal
Greater Than Or Equal.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values. The result is true if the first input is greater than or equal to the second input, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for the 'greater than or equal' condition

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the first input is greater than or equal to the second input, false otherwise

Less Than Or Equal.name: Less Than Or Equal
Less Than Or Equal.description: Executes the output by comparing two input values. The result is true if the first input is less than or equal to the second input, false otherwise.

dynamic.name: Input
dynamic.description: The input to define the value to compare against. All inputs will be compared to each other for the 'less than or equal' condition

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is true if the first input is less than or equal to the second input, false otherwise

Delay.name: Delay
Delay.description: Delays the execution of the output by a specified amount of time.

static.name: Exec
static.description: The execution input to trigger the delay.

static.name: Ticks
static.description: The number of ticks to delay the execution of the output.

static.name: Cancel
static.description: The execution input to cancel the delay.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered when the delay starts.

static.name: After Delay
static.description: The execution output triggered after the delay has completed.

static.name: Cancel
static.description: The execution output triggered when the delay is canceled.

Floor.name: Floor
Floor.description: Rounds down the input value to the nearest integer.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded down.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded down to the nearest integer.

Ceil.name: Ceil
Ceil.description: Rounds up the input value to the nearest integer.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded up.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded up to the nearest integer.

Round.name: Round
Round.description: Rounds the input value to the nearest integer.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded to the nearest integer.

Min.name: Min
Min.description: Returns the minimum value among the inputs.

dynamic.name: Value
dynamic.description: The input value to be compared.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the minimum value among the inputs.

Max.name: Max
Max.description: Returns the maximum value among the inputs.

dynamic.name: Value
dynamic.description: The input value to be compared.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the maximum value among the inputs.

Lerp.name: Lerp
Lerp.description: Linearly interpolates between two values based on a given factor.

static.name: Start
static.description: The starting value for interpolation.

static.name: End
static.description: The ending value for interpolation.

static.name: Progress
static.description: The interpolation factor between 0 and 1.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the interpolation factor based on the given value.

Inverse Lerp.name: Inverse Lerp
Inverse Lerp.description: Calculates the interpolation factor between two values based on a given value.

static.name: Start
static.description: The starting value for interpolation.

static.name: End
static.description: The ending value for interpolation.

static.name: Value
static.description: The value for which to calculate the interpolation factor.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the interpolation factor based on the given value.

Lerp Unclamped.name: Lerp Unclamped
Lerp Unclamped.description: Linearly interpolates between two values based on a given factor without clamping the factor between 0 and 1.

static.name: Start
static.description: The starting value for interpolation.

static.name: End
static.description: The ending value for interpolation.

static.name: Progress
static.description: The interpolation factor.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the interpolation factor based on the given value.

Distance.name: Distance
Distance.description: Calculates the distance between two values.

static.name: Input
static.description: The starting value for distance calculation.

static.name: Input
static.description: The ending value for distance calculation.

static.name: Distance
static.description: The output value which is the distance between the two input values.

Vector3 Create.name: Vector3 Create
Vector3 Create.description: Creates a Vector3 value from individual components.

static.name: X
static.description: The X component of the Vector3.

static.name: Y
static.description: The Y component of the Vector3.

static.name: Z
static.description: The Z component of the Vector3.

static.name: Vector3
static.description: The output Vector3 value created from the input components.

Vector3 Split.name: Vector3 Split
Vector3 Split.description: Splits a Vector3 value into individual components.

static.name: Vector3
static.description: The input Vector3 value to be split into individual components.

static.name: X
static.description: The X component of the input Vector3 value.

static.name: Y
static.description: The Y component of the input Vector3 value.

static.name: Z
static.description: The Z component of the input Vector3 value.

static.name: Vector3
static.description: The input Vector3 value to be normalized.

static.name: Results
static.description: The normalized Vector3 value.

Vector3 Dot.name: Vector3 Dot
Vector3 Dot.description: Calculates the dot product of two Vector3 values.

static.name: LHS
static.description: The left-hand side Vector3 value for the dot product.

static.name: RHS
static.description: The right-hand side Vector3 value for the dot product.

static.name: Result
static.description: The dot product of the two input Vector3 values.

Vector3 Cross.name: Vector3 Cross
Vector3 Cross.description: Calculates the cross product of two Vector3 values.

static.name: LHS
static.description: The left-hand side Vector3 value for the cross product.

static.name: RHS
static.description: The right-hand side Vector3 value for the cross product.

static.name: Result
static.description: The cross product of the two input Vector3 values.

API Request.name: API Request
API Request.description: Sends a request to the API with the specified data.

static.name: Trigger
static.description: The execution input to trigger the API request.

static.name: API
static.description: The API endpoint to send the request to.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output triggered when the API request is sent.

static.name: On Response
static.description: The execution output triggered when the API request receives a response.

static.name: Success
static.description: Indicates whether the API request was successful.

static.name: Response Code
static.description: The response code received from the API request.

static.name: Data
static.description: The data retrieved from the API corresponding to the specified URL.

Command Get Sender.name: Command Get Sender
Command Get Sender.description: Gets the sender of the command.

static.name: Command
static.description: The command input to get the sender from.

static.name: Sender
static.description: The player who sent the command.

Command Get Arguments.name: Command Get Arguments
Command Get Arguments.description: Gets the arguments of the command.

static.name: Command
static.description: The command input to get the arguments from.

static.name: Arguments
static.description: The arguments of the command.

Get All Players.name: Get All Players
Get All Players.description: Gets a list of all players currently in the game.

static.name: Players
static.description: The list of all players currently in the game.

Get Player Count.name: Get Player Count
Get Player Count.description: Gets the count of all players currently in the game.

static.name: Player Count
static.description: The count of all players currently in the game.

Get Player By Name.name: Get Player By Name
Get Player By Name.description: Gets a player by their name.

static.name: Name
static.description: The name of the player to get.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player with the specified name, or null if no such player exists.

Get Player By UUID.name: Get Player By UUID
Get Player By UUID.description: Gets a player by their UUID.

static.name: UUID
static.description: The UUID of the player to get.

static.name: Player
static.description: The player with the specified UUID, or null if no such player exists.

Play Audio At Position.name: Play Audio At Position
Play Audio At Position.description: Plays an audio clip at a specified position in the game world.

static.name: Trigger
static.description: The execution input to trigger the audio playback.

static.name: Audio Clip
static.description: The audio clip to be played.

static.name: Position
static.description: The position in the game world where the audio should be played.

static.name: Volume
static.description: The volume at which the audio should be played, where 1 is full volume and 0 is silent.

static.name: Run
static.description: The execution output that triggers when the audio starts playing.

static.name: On Complete
static.description: The execution output that triggers when the audio finishes playing.

Get Position.name: Get Position
Get Position.description: Gets the position of a specified entity in the game world.

static.description: The entity to get the position of.

static.name: Position
static.description: The position of the specified entity in the game world.

Execution Integer Switch.name: Execution Integer Switch
Execution Integer Switch.description: Executes different outputs based on the value of an integer input.

static.name: Exec
static.description: The execution input to trigger the switch.

static.name: Value
static.description: The integer value to switch on.

static.name: Failed
static.description: The default execution output triggered when the input value does not match any of the defined cases.

dynamic.name: {dynamic_port_index}
dynamic.description: The execution output for a specific case, where the case number corresponds to the integer value input.

Execution String Switch.name: Execution String Switch
Execution String Switch.description: Executes different outputs based on the value of a string input.

static.name: Exec
static.description: The execution input to trigger the switch.

static.name: Value
static.description: The string value to switch on.

static.name: Failed
static.description: The default execution output triggered when the input value does not match any of the defined cases.

dynamic.name: {dynamic_port_index}
dynamic.description: The execution output for a specific case, where the case number corresponds to the string value input.

For.name: For
For.description: Executes a loop a specified number of times.

static.description: The execution input to trigger the loop.

static.name: From (Inclusive)
static.description: The starting value of the loop (inclusive).

static.name: To (Exclusive)
static.description: The ending value of the loop (exclusive).

static.name: Loop
static.description: The execution output triggered for each iteration of the loop.

static.name: Index
static.description: The current index of the loop iteration, starting from the 'From' value and incrementing by 1 each time until it reaches the 'To' value.

static.name: Done
static.description: The execution output triggered when the loop has completed all iterations.

For Each.name: For Each
For Each.description: Executes a loop for each item in a list.

static.description: The execution input to trigger the loop.

static.name: List
static.description: The list of items to loop through.

static.name: Loop
static.description: The execution output triggered for each iteration of the loop.

static.name: Item
static.description: The current item from the list for this iteration of the loop.

static.name: Index
static.description: The current index of the loop iteration, starting from 0 and incrementing by 1 each time until it reaches the length of the list minus one.

static.name: Done
static.description: The execution output triggered when the loop has completed all iterations.

Sequence.name: Sequence
Sequence.description: Executes a series of outputs in order.

static.description: The execution input to trigger the sequence.

dynamic.name: {dynamic_port_index}
dynamic.description: The execution outputs that are triggered in order when the sequence is executed

Ceil to Int.name: Ceil to Int
Ceil to Int.description: Rounds up the input value to the nearest integer and outputs it as an integer type.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded up.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded up to the nearest integer, output as an integer type.

Color To HSV.name: Color To HSV
Color To HSV.description: Converts a color value to its HSV (Hue, Saturation, Value) representation.

static.name: Color
static.description: The input color value to be converted to HSV.

static.name: Hue
static.description: The output Hue component of the HSV representation of the input color (0-360).

static.name: Saturation
static.description: The output Saturation component of the HSV representation of the input color (0-1).

static.name: Value
static.description: The output Value component of the HSV representation of the input color (0-1).

Color to RGB.name: Color to RGB
Color to RGB.description: Converts a color value to its RGB (Red, Green, Blue) representation.

static.name: Color
static.description: The input color value to be converted to RGB.

static.name: Red
static.description: The output Red component of the RGB representation of the input color (0-255).

static.name: Green
static.description: The output Green component of the RGB representation of the input color (0-255).

static.name: Blue
static.description: The output Blue component of the RGB representation of the input color (0-255).

Floor to Int.name: Floor to Int
Floor to Int.description: Rounds down the input value to the nearest integer and outputs it as an integer type.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded down.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded down to the nearest integer, output as an integer type.

Int to Float.name: Int to Float
Int to Float.description: Converts an integer value to a float value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input integer value to be converted to float.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input integer converted to a float value.

Round to Int.name: Round to Int
Round to Int.description: Rounds the input value to the nearest integer and outputs it as an integer type.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value to be rounded.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output value which is the input value rounded to the nearest integer, output as an integer type.

Parse Bool.name: Parse Bool
Parse Bool.description: Parses a string input to determine its boolean value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be parsed as a boolean.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output boolean value resulting from parsing the input string. Commonly, 'true' (case-insensitive) will parse to true, and 'false' (case-insensitive) will parse to false. If the input cannot be parsed as a boolean, the output may default to false or throw an error based on implementation.

Parse Color.name: Parse Color
Parse Color.description: Parses a string input to determine its color value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be parsed as a color. This can be in formats such as hex (e.g., '#ff0000' for red), RGB (e.g., 'rgb(255, 0, 0)' for red), or color names (e.g., 'red').

static.name: Result
static.description: The output color value resulting from parsing the input string. If the input string is in a valid color format, it will be converted to a color type. If the input cannot be parsed as a color, the output may default to a specific color (e.g., black) or throw an error based on implementation.

Parse Float.name: Parse Float
Parse Float.description: Parses a string input to determine its float value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be parsed as a float. The string should represent a valid floating-point number (e.g., '3.14', '-0.001', '2e10').

static.name: Result
static.description: The output float value resulting from parsing the input string. If the input string is in a valid float format, it will be converted to a float type. If the input cannot be parsed as a float, the output may default to 0.0 or throw an error based on implementation.

Parse Int.name: Parse Int
Parse Int.description: Parses a string input to determine its integer value.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input string value to be parsed as an integer. The string should represent a valid integer number (e.g., '42', '-7', '0').

static.name: Result
static.description: The output integer value resulting from parsing the input string. If the input string is in a valid integer format, it will be converted to an integer type. If the input cannot be parsed as an integer, the output may default to 0 or throw an error based on implementation.

To String.name: To String
To String.description: Converts an input value of any type to its string representation.

static.name: Value
static.description: The input value of any type to be converted to a string representation.

static.name: Result
static.description: The output string value resulting from converting the input value to a string. The exact format of the string representation may depend on the type of the input value and the implementation of the conversion.

String Format.name: String Format
String Format.description: Formats a string using placeholders and input values.

static.name: Format
static.description: The input string format containing placeholders (e.g., 'Hello, {0}! You have {1} new messages.').

dynamic.name: Value
dynamic.description: A value to be formatted into the string, where the index of the value corresponds to the placeholder number in the format string (e.g., the first dynamic input corresponds to {0}, the second to {1}, etc.).

static.name: Result
static.description: The output string resulting from replacing the placeholders in the format string with the corresponding input values. The exact formatting may depend on the implementation of the string formatting function.
